title: E-commerce Product Recommendation Analytics Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Recommendation Analytics Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='50' y='50' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='50' y='100' width='200' height='200' fill='#B7D7CD'/><g transform='translate(50, 150)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' fill='#411C56'/><text x='10' y='15' font-size='14' fill='#FFFFFF'>Search:</text></g><g transform='translate(300, 50)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='10' y='25' font-size='14' fill='#FFFFFF'>Price:</text></g><g transform='translate(50, 250)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='40' fill='#090a0f'/><text x='10' y='35' font-size='14' fill='#FFFFFF'>Results:</text></g><rect x='20' y='260' width='360' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD'/><g transform='translate(20, 270)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='60' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='10' y='15' font-size='14' fill='#FFFFFF'>1-10</text></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the specified color palette.
Must implement advanced product filtering options (category, price range, brand).
Must include a price slider with real-time product recommendations.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Recommendation Analytics Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify the implementation of product filtering options, price slider, and recommendation results table with sorting and pagination.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
